recipe_description: To begin making Avarekalu Kadubu Recipe (Hyacinth Beans Steamed Dumplings), take a kadai and dry roast the rice rava on a medium heat for about 5 minutes or until 5 minters or until frgrant and pour it out Keep Aside.boil Hyacinth Beans with a Little Salt in Water Until they are cooked well. This will take Around 10 minutes. It is better not to use a pressure cooker; Use a saucepan to cook the lilva beans sense they will retain their shape and wont be mushy.drain and keep aside on a plate to cool till handleable. You can reserve the drained water to use for laater.put the idli steamer on medium heat with a cup water added to it.take a bowl, add the dry roasted rice Rava, boiled hayacinth sentence, chopped curry leves, chopped curry leaed Season with salt and mix well.to this add 1/2 cup lukewarm water (you can use the stock of water that you cooked the avarekalu in) and mix well. The mixture should be crumbly but should hold the shape if pressed tightly between fingers and palm.Take a small portion of the mixture, and hold it tightly to form a ball. Likewise, Form Small Balls of Kadubu with the rest of the mixture.place these kadubu into the steamers, close it with a lid and step for about 8 minutes on medium high heat or till film and done. Steamed Dumplings) Along with South Indian Coconut Chutney for Breakfast along with

recipe_ingredients: 3 Potatoes (Aloo) Boiled And Cut Into Cubes, 2 Green Chillies Finely Chopped, 1 Inch Ginger Grated, 5-6 Curry Leaves Finely Chopped, 1/2 Teaspoon Mustard Seeds (Rai/ Kadugu), 1 Teaspoon White Dal /2 Teaspoon Turmeric Powder (Haldi), 1 Teaspoon Oil, 1 Coriander (Dhania) Leaves Small Bunch Finaly Chopped
recipe_description: To begin making the urulai kizhangu masiyal recipe (potatoes in a tangy lemon and ginger gravy), we will first cook the potatoes until soft. Once soft, peel the potatoes and cut them into dices. Watch video recipe of how to cook potatoes in pressure cookThe next step is to spice up the potatoes to make the masiyal.heat a teaspoon of oil in a heavy bottom paan on medium heat; Add the mustard seeds and the halved urad dal; Allow them to Crackle and the Dal to Turn Light Golden Brown.stir in the Ginger, Curry Leaves, Turmic Powder, Greeniver in the Ginger, Curry Leaves, Curry Leaves, Turmeric Powder, Turmeric Powder, Green Chillies, Salt Along Potatoes, Boled Potatoes. Turn the heat to low and simmer the urulai kizhangu for about 10 minutes. The mixture will look like a mish mash of potatoes.finally stir in the lemon juice and freshly chopped coriander leaves. Check the salt and spice levels and adjust to suit your taste.serv

recipe_ingredients: 1 Cup Cooked Rice Soaked In, 2 Cups Water Over Night, 1/4 Cup Curd (Dahi / Yogurt) Or ½ Cup Buttermilk, 2 Tablespoon Onions Chopped, 2 Gren Chillies Finly Chopped Saalt To Taste Forka, 3 Potatoes (Aloo), 1/2 Teaspoon Turmeric Powder (Haldi), 1 Tablespoon Mustard Oil, 2 Green Chillies Salt To Taste
recipe_description: To prepare assamese poita bhat with aloo pitika recipe, soak lefttover rice rice in 2 cups water overnight.next morning, add beaten curd or buttermilk and mix well in a mixing bowl. Add salt, chopped onions and green chilies. Keep Aside.To Prepare Aloo Pitika, Boil Potatoes, Peel The Skin and Mash It Well. Make sure no lumpy pieces are present.heat mustard oil in a kadai and when oil turns smoking hot, add turmeric powder.whisk it qukkly and pour it into mashed potatoes. Mix Well.Add Chopped Green Chilies and Mix Again. Aloo Pitika is ready.Serv

recipe_ingredients: 1 Cup Idli Rice Washed And Dried, 1/2 Cup Fresh Coconut, 1 Cucumber Grated, 1 Tablespoon Sugar Sal A Pin Or To Taste
recipe_description: To begin making the mangalore style southe gatti, we will wash the rice thoroughly with water and place them spread over a table cloth so that it dries away faster.grind it in a mixer, cheeser to a mixer, slept. Also to a CoARSE Mixture.mix all the rest of the ingredients into a bowl and you will have a consistency of a dropping batter.heat a vegetable step, if you are using a banana leaf cutlets leaf cut Center and fold it tightly and carefully place it inside the steamer. You can as well use a parachment paper.steam them for at least 15 minutes and servE hot. Serve the mangalore style southe gatti along with coconut chutney, tomato onion chutney to enjoy the breakfast.

recipe_ingredients: 1-1/2 Cup Sooji (Semolina/Rava), 1/2 Cup Whole Wheat Flour, 1/2 Cup Water, 1 Onion Finly Chopped, 1 Tomato Finly Chopped, 1 Cup Curd (Dahi/Yogurt), 1/4 Cup Carrot (Gajjar)  Grated, 1/4 Cup Raw Papaya Grated, 1/4 Cup Cabbage (Patta Gobi/Muttaikose) Grated, 1/4 Cup Green Bell Pepper (Capsicum) Greted, 2 Green Chillies Finely Chopped Coriander (Dhania) ), 1/2 Teaspoon Black Pepper Powder Salt To Taste, 1 Teaspoon Extra Virgin Olive Oil
recipe_description: To begin making the semolina vegetable chila recipe, in a bowl, make a batter of semolina, curd, and water by mixing them toge. Add wheat flour too. The consistency of the batter should not be runny, Neither it should be too thick. Let the batter rest for at least 20-25 minutes. If after adding vegetables the batter becomes thick then add a little water or curd.Now take a non-stick pan and put it on low medium flame.brush it with little oil. Once the pan is hot, pour a big ladle of mixture and spread it even on the pan. It should be thin like a pancake.put the lid on and let the chila gets cooked in steam on low flame for 5-7 minutes. Once a while flip the chila, so that both sides get cooked even and yellowish golden in color. Make rest of the chilas in a similar way.serv

recipe_ingredients: 6 Brinjal (Baingan/Eggplant) Cubed, 1 Potato (Aloo) Cubed, 15 Shallots Finly Chopped, 1 Tomato Finly Chopped, 1 Teaspoon Sambar Power Poder Powder, 1 Tespoon Reder Powder Powder, 1/2 Cup Water Tamarind Lemon Sized To Temper, 2 Tablespoon Oil, 1/8 Teaspoon Asafoetida (Hing) Curry Leaves Handful, 3 Dry Red Chilli, 1/4 Teaspoon Methi Seeds (Fenugreek Seeds), 1 Teaspoon Mustard Seeds (Rai/Kadugu)
recipe_description: To begin the preparation of kathirikai urulaikizhghu kuzhambhu, in a medium sized pan, heat oil over medium heat. Once the oil is hot, add mustard seeds.Once the mustard seeds splutter, Add the remaining ingredients mentioned under tempering to the oilFry until the urad dal turns slightly brownishAdd chopped onions and cook until they are translucentAdd chopped tomatoes and cook until they become tenderNow, Add cubed brinjals and potato to the mixture in the panadd sambar power, chili power and salt to the mixture. Stir them Well So that Vegetables are also coated with the spice blend.cook with the lid covered until until brinjals and potato become tender.heat a ½ cup of water and add tamarind to the hotter. Extract Tamarind Juice and Set Asidedd the extracted tamarind juice to the blend in the pan. Add add 2 cups of water to the gravycook the curry over low heat until brinjals and potatoes are cooked well.simmer the curry till the oil the oil separates from the gravy.serve

recipe_ingredients: 1 Brinjal Cut, 10 Small Onions Cut, 2 Tomatoes Cut, 1 Inch Ginger Finely Chop, 1/2 Cup Tamarind Water, 1 Teaspoon Sambar Powder Spoon Jaggery, 1 Teaspoon Mustard, 1 Twig Kadhi Leaf, 1 Tbsp Of Sesame Oil Green Coriander According To Taste According To Use For Garnish
recipe_description: To make the Kathriiki Gothsu recipe, first heat the oil in a pressure cooker. Add the mustard seeds and let it fall. Add powder, salt, jaggery, water and mix. Close the cook and cook till 3 to 4 cities. Turn off the gas and let the pressure come out on its own. Open the cooker, mix and garnish with green coriander. Serve the Kathiyiki Gothsu recipe with Ven Pongal and Filter Coffee for the morning breakfast.

recipe_ingredients: 2, 200 Grams Of Cheese Cut, 2 Chakundar Peel And Cut, 1 Onion Finely Chop, 2 Green Chillies Take, 1 Inch Ginger Tighten, 2 Bud Garlic Finely Chop, 1 Teaspoon Coriander Powder, 1 Teaspoon, 1 Teaspoon Garam Masala Powder, 3/4 Cup Coconut Milk, 2 Teaspoons Of Oil Salt According To Use Red Chili Powder According To Taste According To Taste
recipe_description: To make Chakundar Paneer Curry, first of all, add 1 cup of water, turmeric powder and salt in a pressure cooker. Cook more for. Turn off the gas and let the pressure come out automatically. After the pressure comes out, add coconut milk, cheese, coriander powder, garam masala powder and let it boil. After boiling, turn off the gas and take it out in a bowl. Serve. Serve the Kachundar Paneer Curry with spinach raita and rice/tava paratha for the day's dinner.

recipe_ingredients: 1 Banana Stem Wash And Cut, 1 Cup Black Gram Soaked Overnight, 2 Tablespoons Coconut Tighten, 2 Teaspoons Cumin, 2 Teaspoon Coriander Seeds, 1-1/2 Teaspoons Red Chilli Powder, 2 Onion, 1 Bud Garlic Peeling Curry Leaves Salt As Per Use Oil As Per Taste Green Coriander Little, 1 Green Chili, 1 Teaspoon Of Lemon Juice
recipe_description: To make Bande Dindu Kadle Palya recipe, first cut a more part of the banana stem. Trim the top and bottom of it and cut it finely. Now add black gram and water in a pressure cooker. Cook until 1 to 2 cities come. Let the pressure come out on its own. Open the cook and add banana stem, salt and cook for 1 city. Let the pressure come out automatically. Add coriander seeds to the pan and roast for 1 minute. Keep separately. Heat some more oil in the same pan. Add cumin seeds, curry leaves and cook for 10 seconds. Now add onion, garlic and cook till the onion is soft. Turn off the gas and let it cool slightly. In a mixer grinder, add CK coriander seeds, cooked onion garlic mixture, coconut, a little water and grind it. Now open the cooker and put it in a pan. Add ground masala to it and mix. Add red chili powder, salt and let it boil. After boiling, turn off the gas, add lemon juice and mix. Garnish with green coriander and chili and serve. Serve the Bande Dindu Kadale Palya recipe with Lachha Paratha and Palak Raita for the day's dinner.

recipe_ingredients: 200 Grams Shallots, 4 Sprig Curry Leaves, 2 Cups Tamarind Water, 1/2 Teaspoon Mustard Seeds (Rai/Kadugu), 1/4 Teaspoon Asafoetida (Hing) And Ground To Paste, 1 Tablespoons Coriander (Dhania) Seeds, 1/2 Teaspoon Cumin Seeds (Jeera), 6 Dry Red Chillies, 1 Cup Fresh Coconut Grated
recipe_description: To prepare kerala style ulli theeyal (kerala vengayam puli kuzhambu recipe) Dry roast the ingredients - coriander seeds, cumin seeds, red chillies and coconut until the cococut looses some of its moisture and become golden brown. Cool and BLEND into a Coarse Paste Adding Just a Little Waterheat The Oil in a Heavy Bottomed PAN; Add in the mustard seeds and allow it to crackle. Add in the curry leaves and the halved shallots. Saute on Medium Heat Until the Shallots are tender and have turned golden brown. This takes a good 10 minutes .Once the onions are roasted in the oil; Add in the tamarind water, asafoetida, turmeric power, salt and the roasted coconut paste. Stir all the ingredients well and simmer on low heat for about 10 minutes.Turn off the heat and transfer to a serving bowl.serv .

recipe_ingredients: 1 Cup Dates, 2 Tablespoon Dry Coconut (Kopra) Grated, 2 Teaspoon Poppy Seeds, 2 Tablespoon Milk Powder, 1 Teaspoon Cardamom Powder (Elaichi) For The Cover, 1 Cup Whole Wheat Flour + Flour For Dusting, 1 Tablespoon Ghee Or Butter, 1/2 Cup Milk Salt A Pinch
recipe_description: To begin making the khajur satori recipe, remove seeds from the dates if you are not using seedless dates. Chop them roughly and add them to a grinder. Make a paste and keep it aside in a separethe bowl.dry roast poppy seeds and coconut in a pan separely until until until the raw smell goes away. Add it to the dates paste. Mix Everything and Keep It Aside with a Lid on It.Get a bowl and add why wheat flour in it. Add salt and mix it.heat a pan and add ghee/butter in it. Add this hot ghee over the wheat flour. Mix Everything with Your Hands. Make a medium soft dough by adding little milk at a time. Cover it with a Damp Cloth and Keep It Aside for One Hour. After one hour, knead the dough again and make equal size balls. Get a stuffing and make the same amount of balls.get one flour ball and roll out in a small disk using rolling pin. Get a Dates Stuffing Ball and Place it in the center of rolled flour ball. Gather the edges and seal them togeether.flatn this ball with your hands and roll out in a small circle using very little flour for dusting. The 'Satori' should be thin.heat tava/griddle and place this rolled flat bread and brush the sides and the center with some ghee/butter. Cook from both the sides by flipping the other side.Serve hot or cold with ghee/butter. You can store these for a week in a airtight container.serv

recipe_ingredients: 1 Cup Whole Wheat Flour, 1/4 Cup Sooji (Semolina/Rava), 4 Tablespoons Ghee Melted, 1/2 Cup Caster, 1 Tablespoon Whoon Whole Almonds (Badam) Chopped, 1 Tablespoon Pippon Pippon Pippon Pippod, 1 ), 1/4 Cup Arhar Dal (Split Toor Dal), 1/4 Cup Green Moong Dal (Split), 1/4 Cup White Urad Dal (Split), 1 Cup Tomato Chopped, 1/2 Teaspoon Turmeric Power Powder, 1 Teaspoon Coriander Powder (Dhania), 1/2 Teaspoon Garam Masala Powder, 1 Tablespoon Coriander (Dhania) Leaves Finalye Chopped For Temping:, 1 Tablespoon Ghee, 1 Teaspoon Mustard Seeds (Rai/Kadugu), 2 Cloves (Laung), 1/2 Teaspoon Cumin Seeds (Jeera), 1/2 Teaspoon Cinnamon Powder (Dalchini) Assafoetida (Hing) Asafoetida (Hing) Asafotida Red Chilli, 1 Bay Leaf (Tej Patta) For Baati:, 1 Cup Whole Wheat Flour, 1/4 Cup Sooji (Semolina/Rava), 2 Tablespoons Gram Flour (Besan), 3 Tablespoon Ghee Melted, 1 Teaspoon Salt, 1/2 Cup Milk For Stuffing, 1 Tablespoon Oil, 1 Green Chilli Finely Chopped, 1 Teaspoon Fennel Seeds (Saunf), 1 Teaspoon Coriander (Dhania) Seeds Asafoetida (Hing) A Pinch, 1 Cup Green Peas (Matar) Fozen, 1 Teasoon Powpon Red Chilli Powder, 1 Teaspoon Coriander Powder (Dhania) Salt To Taste For Serving, Lemon Sliced ��Green Chilli Sliced ��Papad Ghee Melted (As Required)
recipe_description: To begin making the baked stuffed baati with churma and panchratna dal recipe, first we will make the churma. For churma, in a mixing bowl take wheat flour, semolina and ghee, add water to form a strike. Prepare all and keep them aside.the next step is to make the dal. Rinse the daals well and pressure cook for 5 whistles along with a pinch of turmeric power, salt and 3 cups of water. Once pressure releases, mash it well with a laddle and set aside.in a pan heat ghee, add the items listed under 'to tempor' and let it splutter. Then Add Tomatoes Along with Red Chilli Powder, Turmeric Powder, Coriander Powder and Garam Masala Along with Salt and Saute for Few Minutes Until the Tomatoes Soft.Now Added Dal and Mix Well. Let the Dal Boil for 5 Minutes, Add Little Water If its Too Thick. Finally garnish with coriander leaves.next, we will make the baati. In a mixing bowl, take all the ingredients listed under 'Bati', mix well and knead it togeether to form a stiff dough.divide the dough into small balls and keep theem assistant. Now for stuffing, into medium sized pan, heat oil, add fennel seeds and coriander seeds. Add green chillies, and green peas.add salt, remaining dry ingredients and mix it well. Cook for 5-7 minutes and mash the peas using spatula and mix it well. Cook for another 5 minutes and switch off the flame, allows to cool down.Once it's complete cool, divide them into equal portions. Now flatten the baati and stuff one portion of the stuffing we made, and against flatten them using your palms. Prepare all the baatis likweise. Make a small indentation in the center of the baatis using your thumb.preheat the microwave on 200 degrees. Place the churma and baatis into it and bake them first for 15 minutes. Let them cool down at Room Temperature. So your baatis is ready! Grind it a little coarse. Collect the mixture in a bowl, add castor sugar and mix well. Add almonds, pistachios along with ghee and give a quick mix. Churma is ready! So your delicious treatment is ready! Serve it with Papad, Green Chilli, Lemon SLICE AND SUDH DESHE GHEE!

recipe_ingredients: 1 Cup Black Urad Dal (Whole), 1/2 Cup Rajma (Large Kidney Beans), 1 Teaspoon Cumin Seeds (Jeera), 1-1/2 Cup Homemade Tomato Puree Pure, 1 Teaspoon Kashmiri Red Chilli Polepo, 1 Cup Milk, 2 Teaspoon Garam Masala Powder, 1/2 Teaspoon Cardamom Powder (Elaichi), 1 Teaspoon Kasuri Methi (Dred Fenugreek Leaves)
recipe_description: To begin making the dal makhani recipe without onion and garlic, soak black lentil and rajma overnight in water or at least 8 hours.Take a pressure cooker, put in it the soaked dal then add 1 cup milk, 2 copy , Cardamom Powder, Salt, Chili Powder. Allow it to Cook for 5 to 6 Whistles. After 5 to 6 Whistles, Turn the Heat to Low and Allow it to Cook on Low Heat for another 20 to 25 minutes. After about 25 minutes, turn off the heat.allow the pressure to release naturally. In a heavy bottomed pan, heat 2 tablespoons butter over medium heat, add the cumin seeds and allow it to crackle. Pour the Tomato Pueree in the Next Step, when Tomato is Well Cooked, Add the Cooked Dal Makhani Into This Mixture. Check the salt and spices and adjust to suit your taste.ster the no onion no garlic dal makhani well, until it forms a creamy mixture. You can also lightly mash it. Finally stir in the cream and simmer on low heat for another 5 minutes and turn off the heat. Serve the delicious dal makhani recipe without onion and garlic along with naan, tandoori paneer tikka masala recipe and a raita for a delectable weekend lunch or dinner.

recipe_ingredients: 1 Orange,1 Lemon, Half ginger, 2 carrots
recipe_description: Wash all of your produce including the whole carrots. Cut it into pieces small enough to fit through the feeding tube of your juicer. See my list of the best juicers for carrots. Feed the vegetable and fruit pieces into the feeding tube of your juicer. Alternate hard and soft pieces of fruit and vegetable to help get the most juice out of your fruits and veggies. Serve your cup of carrot juice immediately. It is best served right after you make it.
recipe_name: Carrot Juice Recipe with Orange & Gubger

recipe_ingredients: 2 Curly kale, Half Lemon,  Little bit ginger, Less the half cumber, 1 Granny smith apples, 1 Celery stalks
recipe_description: Wash and prep veggies. Juice in order listed. Optional- Strain through a sieve (if you don't like pulp). Drink immediately and enjoy.

recipe_ingredients: 1 small red Beetroot, 1 large Apple (or 2 small apples), 2 Celery stalks, 1, 2 Carrots, 1/2 Lemon or Lime. 1/2 inch small piece of Ginger, peeled
recipe_description: Wash all vegetables and fruits in running water and pat dry them. Peel and cut beetroot into long slices. Cut apple into long pieces and remove the core. Peel and cut carrot into long pieces. Cut celery into long pieces. Put glass or container under the nozzle of a juicer and turn it on. Process all ingredients (beetroot, apple, carrot, celery, ginger) except lemon alternatively through juicer. Squeeze the half lemon into prepared juice and stir well. Pour it into chilled serving glass and serve. Drink it immediately.

recipe_ingredients: 1/4 cup orange juice, 3 Tbsp lemon juice, 1 small nectarine (pit removed), 1 small apple (cored and quartered), 1 Tbsp fresh ginger (peeled), 4-6 whole carrots (peeled/tops removed), 3-4 sprigs fresh mint (optional), 1-2 cups filtered water.
recipe_description: If using a juicer, add all ingredients to the juicer and press (omit water). Otherwise, squeeze orange and lemon juice into a blender as the pulp can make the juicing process more difficult. Next add nectarine, apple, ginger, carrots, and mint (optional). Top with filtered water (start with the lesser quantity), cover and blend until combined. You don’t want your blender to get the juice too hot in temperature so be careful not to over-blend – it shouldn’t take more than 30 seconds. Drape a clean, thin towel over a large mixing bowl and carefully pour over the juice and pulp. Then gather the corners and begin extracting the juice, leaving the pulp behind. Continue squeezing until all juice is extracted. You can either compost the pulp or add it to baked goods! Enjoy the juice fresh. Cover and refrigerate leftovers for 2-3 days, though best in the first 12-24 hours for mineral and vitamin content.

recipe_ingredients: 8-12 fresh organic cucumbers; skin on, 1 whole lemon, 1 bunch fresh mint (reserve 2 sprigs), Optional: one scoop Further Food Collagen
recipe_description: Scrub cucumbers well and cut into pieces that will fit into your juicer. Run cucumbers, mint and lemon through the juicer. Stir in collagen if using. Garnish with fresh mint.

recipe_ingredients: 2 cups pineapple cubes, 1 cup of water ( or coconut water), 1 tsp salt optional, 1 tsp black pepper, 1 inch ginger (peeled).
recipe_description: Cut off both ends of the pineapple. Cut down the pineapple's skin with a sharp knife from top to bottom. Repeat peeling off the skin all around. Keep the core intact. If juicing in a blender, cut them into cubes. If making in a juicer, cut to the size that fits your juicer chute. Add them to a blender jar or juicer chute along with all the other ingredients desired except lemon juice. Blend until smooth. If using a blender, then place a strainer over a bowl. Pour the juice and filter it. Press down with a spoon to bring out the juice from the pulp. Stir in the lemon juice. Serve pineapple juice fresh.

recipe_ingredients: 2 Fuji apples, cored and sliced. 1 orange, peeled and sectioned. ½ lemon, peeled. 1 (1 inch) piece fresh ginger. ½ teaspoon ground turmeric
recipe_description: Process apples, orange, lemon, and ginger through a juicer; stir in turmeric until evenly incorporated.
recipe_name: Turmeric Ginger C Boost Life Juice

recipe_ingredients: 2 cups packed baby spinach leaves, Handful parsley leaves and stems, 1 medium green apple, rinsed with core removed, 1 large seedless (hothouse or English) cucumber, rinsed, 1-inch length piece fresh ginger, scrubbed clean, 1 medium lemon
recipe_description: Chop the apple, cucumber and ginger into thin pieces small enough to easily go through the juicer.Cut away the yellow peel from the lemon, leaving most of the white pith and lemon flesh. Cut into slices and remove any seeds. Reserve about half of the lemon. Turn the juicer on and push everything through, alternating between the greens and the firmer cucumber, apple and lemon. When everything but the reserved lemon has been juiced, stir the juice and taste for tartness. Add the remaining lemon if you feel it can take it. Or if the juice is too tart, consider adding a couple scrubbed unpeeled carrots or another cored apple.

recipe_ingredients: 2 pears (medium size), 2 cups chilled water or any juice, 11⁄2 lemon, 1⁄2 inch ginger (Peeled, optional), 1 to 2 tablespoons sweetener (optional)
recipe_description: Wash pears very well under running water. Pat dry. If not using organic then peel the skin and cut them to quarters and remove the core.To keep the skin - Organic pears can be used with skin on. You can scrub them well with some vinegar and salt. Leaves for 5 mins. Rinse well under running water. Add the deseeded and quartered pears to a blender. Pour 2 cups chilled water. You may add ginger, lemon juice and sweetener if you want Blend until smooth. You can optionally strain to remove the ginger fibers. If it is too thick you may add more water. Pour pear juice to serving glasses and consume immediately, You can optionally add ice cubes if you prefer.

recipe_ingredients: 3 cups fresh strawberries rinsed, stemmed and cut in half, 1 green apple cored and cut into large pieces, 1 lime peeled and quartered
recipe_description: Turn on the juicer. Add ingredients, one at a time. Divide the juice between two ice-filled glasses.

recipe_ingredients: 15 Ash Gourd Chips, 1 Teaspoon Coconut Oil, 1/4 Cup Fresh Coconut Grated, 3 Whole Black Peppercorns, 1 Teaspoon Coriander (Dhania) Seeds, 1/2 Teaspoon Turmerc Powder
recipe_description: To begin making the vadyancho ross recipe, on a medium high heat, fry the ash gourd chips on a frying pan using a teaspoon of oil.Oil.Ol.Ol.Ol.Ol.Ole. Grind togaTher grated coconut, peppercorns, coriander seeds, turmeric powder, dry red chilies and tamarind using very little water.take the ground paste in a saucepappt on MeediM heat and alliance. Once it boils, add the fried ash gourd chips and mix. Allow the mixture to boil for 2-3 more minutes.finally add salt, mix and remove from heat. Serve hot.serv

recipe_ingredients: 1/4 fresh pineapple and cut it into chunks, 4 Kale leaves, fresh, roughly chopped, 4 Swiss chard leaves, fresh roughly chopped, 1 lime, peeled
recipe_description: Peel, core and cut into big pieces the ripe fresh pineapple. Add pieces to the juicer. Wash the kale and swiss chard leaves and chop them roughly. Add them to the juicer too. Peel the lime and add it to juicer too. Juice them together. Serve with some ice if preferred! Recommended to be consumed immediately for full benefits.

recipe_ingredients: 1 medium to large cucumber, 6 small stalks celery ends removed (or 3 large stalks), 1 apple cored (optional but recommended), 1 lemon cut into wedges (or to taste)
recipe_description: Juice cucumber and celery in a juicer. If using, juice the apple as well. Pour into 2 glasses and add squeezes of lemon wedges to taste. (If you're adding the optional apple, you may prefer no lemon at all.)

recipe_ingredients: ¼ pineapple peeled and chopped. 2 oranges peeled and quartered. ½ red mango peeled.
recipe_description: Run all fruits through your juicer. Serve and enjoy!

recipe_ingredients: 24 oz peach (giving 1.5 cups juice), 1/2 tbsp sugar, 1 cup water, 1 tsp lemon juice, 2 cups ice, 1 tbsp mint (a few leaves for garnish)
recipe_description: Turn on your juicer, and add peeled, pitted peach to the feeder. Collect the juice in a container. Pour the container into a large pitcher, and stir in sugar, water, lemon juice. Either place in the fridge or serve right away. Fill serving glasses with ice and pour in the peach juice. Garnish with mint leaves.

recipe_ingredients: 8 Plums, pit removed, 1/2 Lemon, peeled (or 1 tbsp lemon juice) lemon helps keep the juice fresh, 1 cup Water (only if you are using a blender), 1 cup Ice (only if you are using a blender)
recipe_description: Wash and dry all fresh produce, Cut the plums in half to remove the pit. If you are using a blender, blend all of the ingredients along with the ice and water until liquefied. Otherwise use a cold-pressed juicer to extract the juice. Optional: If you use a blender you can strain the mixture through a nut milk bag to separate the pulp for a true “pressed juice” consistency and texture.

recipe_ingredients: 3 carrots, 2 navel oranges, 1/2 cantaloupe melon
recipe_description: Clean and peel the carrots. Cut into smaller pieces. Peel and quarter the oranges. Cut the melon into slices. Remove the seeds and cut off the skin. Juice the carrots, oranges and melon. Mix well and serve chilled.

recipe_ingredients: 1/2 large honeydew melon, 5 kiwi, handful fresh mint leaves
recipe_description: Peel the kiwi and cut into quarters. Cut the melon into slices and remove the skin/rind. Cut the flesh of the melon into cubes small enough to fit into the juicer. Turn on the juicer and juice the kiwi, then the fresh mint leaves, followed by the honeydew melon. Stir the juice and serve chilled.

recipe_ingredients: 3 granny smith apples, 40 green grapes, 8 fresh mint leaves
recipe_description: Wash apples and grapes. Core the apples and cut into quarters. Using an electric juicer, juice the apples followed by the mint and then the grapes. Mix well and serve chilled.
recipe_name: Granny Smith Apple and Green Grapes Juice

recipe_ingredients: 1 cup Coconut Water, 3 Kiwis, peeled, 1/2 medium sized Cucumber, 1 Green Apple, cored and quartered (I use Granny Smith apples), 1 cup Spinach, 1 frozen Banana
recipe_description: Add the ingredients to your blender in the order listed. Blend on high until desired consistency. Enjoy!

recipe_ingredients: 4 cups Water, 4 large Lemons, squeezed (yields about 1 cup of fresh lemon juice), 1/2 cup Agave Nectar (substitute 1 tsp liquid Stevia if you’re watching carbs, making this recipe 3.5 net carbs), 1 tsp E3 Live Blue Spirulina, 1 pinch Salt (helps bring out the sweetness).
recipe_description: Wash the lemons and cut them in half. Using a citrus press or your hands, squeeze the lemon juice into a bowl, removing any seeds. You should get about 1 cup of fresh lemon juice. Whisk together the agave nectar with the lemon juice until thoroughly combined. In a large pitcher, combine the water, agave/lemon juice, blue spirulina, and a pinch of salt. Stir until well combined and the spirulina powder has dissolved. Refrigerate or pour over ice and enjoy!

recipe_ingredients: 2 Cups Whole Wheat Flour, 1/2 Teaspoon Salt, 1 Teaspoon Oil Ingredients For Stuffing, 1 Cup Carrots (Gajjar) Finly Grated, 1/2 Cup Sweet Potatoes Boiled And Mashed, 1 Teaspoon Cumin Power (Jera) (Roasted), 1 Green Chillies Chopped (Adjust), 1/4 Cup Coriander (Dhania)  To Taste
recipe_description: To begin making the sweet potato parathas, we will first make the dough. Add flour and salt in a large bowl, adding little water at a time to make soft, pliable dough.knead dugh until it is smooth and elastic. Add oil to coat the dough and knead little more. The dough will be soft and nonsticky. Allow the dout to rest for about 15 minutes, covered.knead dough until it is smooth and elastic. Add oil to coat the dough and knead little more. The dough will be soft and nonsticky. Allow the dout to rest for about 15 minutes, covered.divide the dough into lemon sized balls and roll them out thin to approximate 3 inches in diameter. Note tossing the dough in dry flour while rolling will prevent it from geting sticky when rolling them out.in another bowl, Combine all the ingredients for the filling togetra. Check the salt and spices and adjust to suit your taste.add 1 tablespoon of the stuffing in the center. Gather the sides and brings them togeether. Remove The Little Excess Dough which is popular out when you brieft them togeether.Press the stuffed dough down. Toss it in some flour and roll it gently applying just even pressure to roll. Roll it to desired thickness and your comfort level in rolling.place the stuffed sweet potato carrot parathas on the hot griddle/skillet. Cook on medium heat adding a little oil or ghee to cook the parathas until you notice it gets brown spots on both the sides and has lightly crisp outer crust.Serve Carrots & Sweet Potato Stuffed Paratha Recipe along with Boondi Raita Recipe Spiced With Black Salt, Instant Gor KARI Lonche Recipe - Sweet Raw Mango Pickle and Apple, Kiwi, Pineapple Juice Recipe for a Complete Breakfast.

recipe_ingredients: Two bananas, frozen, One tbsp. of raw honey, One tbsp. of vanilla, ½ a cup of almond milk
recipe_description: Place all ingredients in a blender and blend fully and Enjoy.

recipe_ingredients: One banana (frozen or fresh), 2/3 cup of blueberries (frozen), Half a cup of vanilla soy milk, 1½ teaspoons of flaxseed, One cup of yogurt (fat free), 1½ teaspoons of raw honey
recipe_description: Cut the banana into smaller pieces and put them into the blender, Add the other ingredients without the blueberries, Blend at low speed and slowly add the blueberries, Increase the speed, Enjoy

recipe_ingredients: One frozen banana, Half a cup of orange juice, A quarter of milk, 1 Apple, chopped, peeled and cored
recipe_description: Place all ingredients in a blender and blend fully and Enjoy.

recipe_ingredients: 1 cup of milk, ¼ cup of Greek Yogurt, 1 teaspoon pure vanilla extract, 1 small ripe banana, peeled and sliced, ½ large, ripe papaya, peeled and chopped
recipe_description: Place all ingredients in a blender and blend fully and Enjoy.

recipe_ingredients: 2 oz spinach, 3 cups apple juice, 2 tbsp honey
recipe_description: Juice the spinach. Add water to thin out the consistency if desired., Whisk spinach juice together with apple juice and honey., Serve immediately, add ice, or refrigerate as you wish.

recipe_ingredients: 12 fl oz carrot juice, from 26 oz carrots, 12 fl oz apple juice, from 16 oz apples, 8 fl oz orange juice, from 14 oz oranges, 1 tsp ginger, 2 cups ice
recipe_description: Wash all ingredients thoroughly. Peel carrots, oranges, and ginger., Remove ends and slice carrots into circles. Cut apples into wedges and oranges into quarters. Remove seeds (optional)., Switch on the juicer and pass all ingredients through the feed chute., Once all the juice is collected, stir it to mix, add 1/2 a cup of ice to each glass and pour in the fruit and vegetable juice., Serve cool.

recipe_ingredients: 2 cups ice, 24 fl oz apple juice (20 oz red apple, 4 oz green apple), 1 tsp rosemary
recipe_description: Peel and cut the apples into small chunks., Run the apple chunks through a juicer one by one., Pour the apple juice into serving glasses., Add ice cubes and rosemary for garnish., Enjoy.

recipe_ingredients: 8 oz beets, 1/4 oz ginger, grated, 1 1/2 cup apple, chopped, 1 cup carrots chopped, 2 tbsp honey, 2 tbsp lemon juice
recipe_description: Juice the apples, carrots, ginger, and beets together., Whisk the mixture with lemon juice and honey until dissolved., Pour into small serving glasses. Chill in the fridge for a couple of minutes or serve right away.

recipe_ingredients: 16 oz apple juice, from 20 oz fresh gala apples, 0.5 oz ginger, about 1-inch knob, 8 oz carrot juice, from about 18 oz carrots, 3 tbsp fresh mint leaves, 2 cups ice
recipe_description: Rinse carrots and apples. Drain well and pat dry with a kitchen towel. Remove apple cores and cut into wedges. Peel the carrots and cut into sticks., Run all apples, carrots, and ginger through a juicer., Divide into 4 glasses. Add ice, garnish with mint leaves, and enjoy.

recipe_ingredients: 60 oz fresh grapes, ½ tbsp lemon juice, 1 tbsp sugar, 2 cups ice, 8 leaves spearmint, fresh
recipe_description: Rinse grapes and drain well. Put them in a blender and blend until completely smooth., Put a strainer over a large bowl. Cover the strainer with a cheesecloth. Pour the blended grape juice over the cheesecloth. Gather the edges of the cloth, twist, and squeeze to extract the grape juice. Set aside and discard the skin., In a pitcher, combine grape, lemon juice, and sugar. Stir until sugar dissolves., To serve, pour the drink into four glasses with ice and top with spearmint leaves.

recipe_ingredients: 1-1/2 Cups Mixed Vegetables (Potatoes Carrot Beans Peas) Cut Into Cubes, 1 Onion Thinly Sliced ��1 Tomato Roughly Chopped, 1 Green Chilli Slit, 1 Inch Ginger Sliced ��2 Garilcad, 2 Garilcad, 1 Sriv Leaves, 1 Cup Coconut Milk Thin, 1 Cup Coconut Milk Thick, 1/2 Teaspoon Mustard Seeds (Rai/Kadugu), 1/2 Teaspoon Black Pepper Powder, 2 Teaspoon Oil, 1 Teaspoon J. Made To Paste Salt To Taste
recipe_description: To begin making the mint vegetables moilee recipe, scrape the coconut and extract the thick and thin coconut milk and keep aside.heat oil in a wok/kadhai, on heated heated added added adds and letter Sliced ​​Onions and Sauté Till It Gets Translucent.add the Ginger and the Sliced ​​Garlic Pods and Cook Until The Raw Smell Evaporates.add the cubes vegetables, pepper power and Turmeric POWDER, and SATE SOTE SOTE FORADER Vegetables Cook with the Lid on. This will take 5 to 6 minutes.add the chopped tomatoes and let it cook for a minute. Mix to a boil at this stage else the coconut milk the curdle.switch off the flame, season with salt and add the lemon juice.serv

recipe_ingredients:
40 oz concord grapes
1/4 cup water, 8 tsp honey, 1 tsp lime juice, 1 tsp rosemary, fresh, 2 cups ice cubes
recipe_description: In a small saucepan, add grapes, water, honey, lime juice, and rosemary. Simmer over medium-low heat for 10 minutes. Remove from heat and leave to cool., Add the mixture into a blender. Blend until well mixed., Place a strainer over a bowl and cover with a cheesecloth. Pour the blended juice onto the cheesecloth and gather the four corners to form a pouch. Twist and squeeze the juice out and into the bowl. Discard the residue., Pour the juice into a pitcher. Add honey and lime juice and stir to mix. Serve over ice.

recipe_ingredients: 55 oz green grapes, 2 tbsp sugar, 1/2 tbsp lemon juice, 8 leaves mint, fresh, 2 cups ice cubes
recipe_description: Add grapes, sugar, lemon juice, and mint into a blender. Blend until smooth., Place a strainer over a bowl and cover with a cheesecloth. Pour the blended juice into the cheesecloth and gather the four corners to form a pouch. Twist and squeeze the clear juice out and into the bowl. Discard the residue., Pour the juice into a pitcher. Serve over ice.

recipe_ingredients: 6 oz red grapes, stemmed, 7 oz apple, cored, chopped into chunks, 2 oz lemon, peeled, deseeded, 1/2 cup ice cubes
recipe_description: Wash the grapes and drain the water. Run the grapes, apples, and lemon through the juicer and collect juice in a pitcher. Stir to mix and serve over ice.

recipe_ingredients: 1 Cup Baby Potatoes, 1 Cup Phool Makhana (Lotus Seeds), 1 Teaspoon Cumin Seeds (Jeera), 1 Teaspoon Fennel Seeds (Saunf), 2 Green Chillies Finely Chopped, 1-1/2 Teaspoon Ready Tead Chilli Powderc, 1 Teaspoon Coriander Powder (Dhania) Salt To Taste (Kala Namak Is Using For A Fast), 2 Tablespoons Oil
recipe_description: To begin making the no onion no garlic aloo makhana sabzi recipe, boil baby potatoes along Remove from Heat, Peel The Skin and Keep Aside.heat 1 Tablespoon Oil in a Heavy Bottomed PAN. Add makhana and roast them on medium to low heat until it is crisp. Once done, remove from pan keep aside.add remaining oil into the same pan. Add cumin seeds and let it splutter. Add fennel seeds and chopped green chilies and sauté for about 20 seconds.add all the spice powders including chilli power, Turmeric powder, Turmeric Powder, Coriander Powder, SALT/Black Salt and Immeditly GIDE Add boiled potatoes into the pan and toss well.Oll.once all the potatoes are coated well with the spice mix, add roasted makhana and toss again. Lower the flame and keep tossing and cook for 3 to 4 minutes.remove from flame, garnish with coriander leaves and serve hot.serv Tawa Paratha and Palak Raita for an everyday meal.
recipe_name: No Onion No Garliclo Makhana Sabzi

recipe_ingredients: 1-1/2 Cups Cooked Rice, 1/2 Cup Gram Flour (Besan), 1/2 Teaspoon Red Chilli Powder, 1/4 Teaspoon Turmeric Powder (Haldi), 1 Teaspoon Salt For Kadhi, 2 Tablespoons Gram Flour (Besan), 1 Cup Curd (Dahi/Yogurt), 3-1/2 Cups Water, 1/2 Teaspoon Turmeric Powder (Haldi), 1/2 Teaspoon Red Chilli Powder Salt To Taste, 1 Geren Clite Slit, 1 Inch Ginger Slit, 1  Finely Chopped, 1 Bay Leaf (Tej Patta) Torn, 1 Inch Cinnamon Stick (Dalchini) Broken For Tadka, 1 Tablespoon Ghee, 1 Teaspoon Cumin Seeds (Jeera), 1 Inch Cinnamon Stick (Dalchini) Broken, 1 Sprig Curry Leaves Torn
recipe_description: To make Bhaat Na Rasawala Muthia Dhokla, prep all the ingredients and keep them ready.Into a large mixing bowl, combine all the muthia dhokla ingredients and mash the rice well until it forms a dough like consistency.Grease your palms, shape into small ovals (Muthias) and keep aside.for kadhi, into a sauce pan combine the dahi, besan, turmeric powder, salt and read chilli power and red chilli power and mix cell to comb Boil. Keep whisking the kadhi as it continues to boil, as this makes it smooth and creamy, thus giving it a perfect texture.Onece the kadhi has comether into a smooth and creamy Mixture Mixture Mixture Whill Its, Turning, Turning, Ginger Garlic, Green Chillies, Cinnamon Stick and Simmer Kadhi while we Add the Muthias.Add the Muthia into the kadhi. Simmer for at Least 5 Minutes and You Will Notice The Muthia's Rising to the Top and Floating. Once it begins to float to the top, Simmer the bhaat na rasawala muthia dhokla for another 2 minutes.the final step is to prepare the tadka. Heat ghee in a saucepan on medium heat; Add the cumin seeds and allow them to crackle. Stir in the curry leaves, cinnamon and give it a stir. Gradually, add the seasoning mixture to the Above rasiya dhokla/bhaat na rasawala muthia dhokla and allow the mixture to come to a brisk boil and turn off the heat. the heat na rasawala muthia dhokla You are looking for a comforting meal.

recipe_ingredients: 1 Tablespoon Oil, 1 Badi (Wadi) Urad Dal Spiced Dumpling, 2 Ons Finely Chopped, 2 Tomatoes, 1 Inch Ginger, 1 Potato (Aloo) Cut Ito Wedges, 1 Brinjal (Egplant) Cut Into Wedgespoont Chilli Powder, 1 Teaspoon Cumin Powder (Jeera), 1 Teaspoon Garam Masala Powder, 1 Teaspoon Coriander Powder (Dhania) Salt To Taste To Taste
recipe_description: To begin making the sindhi style wadi aloo ki sabzi recipe, in a pressure cooker heat oil on medium flame.add chopped onens and saute for 3-4 minutes, until it turns into gold And Sauté for 3-4 minutes or until the wadi turns red.close the pressure cooker and cook for 3 whistles. Turn off the heat and let the pressure release naturally. Once the pressure has released, remove only the wadis and place it in a bowl. Combine tomatoes and ginger in a mixer jar and brings to a purée, transfer to a bowl and set aSide. Heat the same pressure cooker with the onens on medium heat, add the potato and brinjal wedges and continue to cook for another 5 minutes. At this stage Add, Red Chilli Powder, Garam Masala Powder, Cumin Powder, Coriander Powder and Salt. Give it a good stir. Now that the onions, potatoes and brinjal are well coated with the masala, add the tomato ginger purée, sauté for 3 minutes. Add the pre cooked wadi and close the pressure cooker. Pressure Cook for 3 Whistles, Reduce the Heat and Continue to Cook for 5 More Minutes. Turn off the heat and allow the pressure to release naturally.serv

recipe_ingredients: 1/2 Cup Fresh Coconut Grated, 4 Dry Red Chillies, 1 Teaspoon Mustard Seeds (Rai/Kadugu), 1/2 Teaspoon Turmeric Powder (Haldi), 20 Grams Tamarind Salt To Taste, 1/3 Cup Water Ophher, 300 Grams Vellai Poosanikai (Ash Gourd/White Pumpkin) Cut Idium Sized Cubes, 1/2 Cup Water, 1/4 Teaspoon Turmeric Powder (Haldi) Salt To Taste For The Tadka, 1 Teaspoon Oil, 1/2 Teaspoon Mustard Seeds (Rai/ Kadugu), 2 Dry Red Chillies, 2 Sprig Curry Leaves
recipe_description: To begin making the kuvale sasam recipe, we will first grind the masala which is the base for the dish. *To make the freshly ground masalain a mixer jar combine, the coconut, red chillies, mustard seeds, turmeric power, Tamarind, Water and Salt to Taste. Grind to a coarse paste. Transfer to a bowl and set aside. Next, Heat a pressure cooker on Medium Heat, Add the Ash Gourd Cubes, Salt, Turmeric Powder and 1/2 Cup of Water and Pressure Cook for 1 Whistle. Turn off the heat and allows the pressure to release naturally. Open the pressure cooker on the pressure has been released, and return the cooker to flame, add in the freshly ground coconut masala, and cook on Medium heat, until it cames to a rolling box. Adjust the consistency of the kuvale sasam by adding water to your liking. Check the salt and seasonings and adjust according to taste. Once done, turn off the heat.Transfer the kuvale sasam to a serving bowl and set aside. *For the tadka of kuvale sasamin a tadka pan, heat oil on medium heat, add the Mustard seeds and allow it to splutter, next add the red chillies and roast for a more a few seconds. Finally add in the curry leaves and allow them to crackle. Turn off the flame, and pour this tadka over the piping hot kuvale sasam and serve hot.serv .

recipe_ingredients: 12 Small Brinjal (Baingan/ Eggplant), 1 Onion Roughly Chopped, 2 Green Chillies Chopped, 12 Cloves Garlic, 1 Inch Ginger, 1/2 Teaspoon Mustard Seeds (Rai/ Kadugu), 1 Inch Cinaf Cloves (Laung), 1 Teaspoon Red Chilli Powder, 1 Teaspoon Cumin Powder (Jeera), 1 Teaspoon Coriander Powder (Dhania), 1/2 Teaspoon Turmeric Powder (Haldi), 1 Cup Tamarind Water Oil Oil Oil Oil, 1/4 Cup Fresh Coconut Grated, 3 Tablespoons Sesame Seeds (Til Seeds), 3 Tablespoons Roasted Peanuts (Moongphali) Corrider (Dhania) Leaves For Garnish
recipe_description: To begin making the hyderabadi bagara baingan recipe, into a heavy bottomed pan, add the sesame seeds, peanuts and roast for a minute till the sesame seeds start popping. Turn off the heat and let it cool.add the roasted peanuts, sesame seeds along with coconut and 1/2 cup warm water into a mixer grinder and blend it to make a smooth paste. Keep it aside.next, add onion, garlic, ginger and green chillies into a mixer grinder and grind it well to make a smooth paste. Keep it aside.heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a heavy bottomed pan; Add mustard seeds and allow it to crackle. Once done add the bay leaf, cinnamon stick, clooves and saute for a less seconds Till the Aromas from the Spices Come Through. Once don, stir in the onion paste and saute for about 2 minutes till the paste is cooked a bit and starts to change the color.after 2 minutes, add in all the Spice POWDES TURDING TONEREC POWDER, CORMERIC POWDER, CUD Chilli POWDER Tamarind water. Add in peanut sesame paste, salt to taste and some water to adjust the consistency.give the bagara baingan gravy a brishk boil for 3 to 4 minutes. Turn off the heat and keep aside.slit the eggplants into quarters without removing the stem. If using large eggplants, cut them lengthwise of one-inch thickness and about 2 inches in lengthe.heat 2 Tablespoons oil in a pan and shallow roast the eggplant with a little SALTLTIL TENDER, COTLTLE SALT SALT SALT SALT SALT SALT SALT SALT SALT SALT SALT SALTH You can optionally cover the eggplant and pan roast it. Covering helps the steam get trapped inseed and cook faster.add the sautéed baingan into the bagara baingan gravy and boil till the gravy reaches the desired consistency. Once done, turn off the heat and transfer the Bagara Baingan to a serving bowl, garnish with coriander leaves and serve hot.Serve Hyderabadi Bagara Baingan Recipe along with Hyderabadi Vegetable Biryani and Tomato Onion Cucumber Raita to make a delicious meal for your festival.

recipe_ingredients: 2 Cup Basmati Rice, 1 Cup Soy Chunks (Nuggets), 4 Onions Sliced, 2 Tomatoes Chopped, 4 Green Chilli Slit, 1 Teaspoon Ginger Garlic Paste, 1 Teaspoon Powder (Haller) Oil Or Ghee Fork, 1 Bay Leaf (Tej Patta), 2 Cardamom (Elaichi) Pods/Seeds, 2 Clooves (Laung), 1/2 Inch Cinnamon Stick (Dalchini), 1 Star Anise, 1 Mace (Javitri) Biryani Masala To Grind, 3 Cardamom (Elaichi) Pods/Seeds, 1 Teaspoon Whole Black Peppercorns, 4 Cloves (Laung), 1 Inch Cinnamon Stick (Dalchini), 1 Teaspoon Fennel Seeds (Saunf)
recipe_description: To begin making the Andhra style vegetarian biryani, soak the soy chunks in 1/4 cup water and keep it aside.soak the basmati rice also in water and keep it aSide. Ground all the spice mix mentioned in the biryani spice mix to a coarse power.heat a pressure cooker with oil. Add bay leaf, cardamom, cinnamon stick, cloves, star anise and mace. Fry the spice for 10 seconds until the Aroma is released.Add the Chopped Onens, Ginger Garlic Paste and Green Chili. Sauté until the onions become light brown.add the Chopped Tomatoes and Little Bit of salt so that the tomatoes will get found faster and become Add only the rice into the sautéed gravy. Add the soaked soya chunks as well. Mix Well Till the Masala is Mixed.Add 4 cups of water, check for Salt and pressure Cook for 2 Whistle and Switch off the heat. Allow the pressure to release by itself and open and mix the rice well with the masala and serve.Serv

recipe_ingredients: 1-1/2 Cups Cooked Rice, 2 Tablespoons Oil, 10 Indian Borage (Doddapatre) Cleaned Washed And Separated, 3/4 Teaspoon Cumin Seeds (Jeera), 1 Teaspoon Chana Dal (Bengal Gram Dal), 1 Teaspoon White Uride Dalites, 2 Cup Desssicated Coconut Chopped, 3 Byadagi Drreed Chillies, 3 Guntur Driad Chillies Coriander (Dhania) Leaves A Less Sprigs Finly Chopped For Garnish Ingredients For Coppering, 1 Teaspoon Mustard Seeds (Rai/Kadugu), 1/2 Teaspoon Chana Dal (Bengal Gram Dal), 1/2 Teaspoon White Urad Dal (Split), 1/4 Teaspoon Asafoetida (Hing), 1 Savanusponusususususususuringphaligpalis  To Taste
recipe_description: To start preparaing doddapatre soppina chitranna (Indian thyme rice) recipe, get all the ingredients Handy first.heat a teaspoon of oil in wide bottomed kadai and add urad dal, channa dal, cumin and ROAST Them Flam Flam. Transfer the seasoning to a mixie/ food processor.add red chillies to the kadai and roast them on low flame until the pungent odor is slightly reduced (takes about 1-2 minutes). Add desiccated coconut and fry for a minute until the pleasant aroma rises. Cool this and add to the mixie along with other ingredients.fry doddapatre leaves in kadai for a minute or two till the Leaves will. Transfer the leaves to the mixie.Now Grind all the ingredients into a smooth paste using little water.heat oil in wide bottomed pan and add mustard, Once it starts spluttering added the channel, Fry Till the Dals Turns Golden and the Groundnuts are Done (The Skin Starts to Peel) .Now add the ground paste and fry for a minute. Mix in the cooked rice, sprinkle some salt and mix until everything is well incored. Doddapatre Soppina Chitranna (Indian Thyme Rice) Recipe is now ready with some chopped corrider leaves to garnish.

recipe_ingredients: 150 Grams Bhindi (Lady Finger/Okra) Chopped To Inch, 1 Cup Paneer (Homemade Cottage Cheese) Cubed, 1 Onion Chopped, 1 Bay Leaf (Tej Patta), 1 Teaspoon Red Chilli Powder, 1/2 Teaspon Powderoc Coriander Powder (Dhania), 1 Teaspoon Sugar Salt To Taste Oil For Cooking Ingredients To Grind, 2 Tomatoes Chopped, 2 Cloves (Laung), 1 Inch Cinnamon Stick (Dalchini), 1 Cardamom (Elaichi) Pods/Seeds, 4 Cloves Garlic, 1 Inch Ginger, 1 Tablespoon Hung Curd (Greke Yogurt)
recipe_description: To begin making the bhindi and paneer masala recipe, grind the tomatoes along with cinnamon, cardamom, clove, garlic, ginger and yogurt to a smooth paste.heat a kadai with oil, add the chopped ladies finger and friies Crispy. Sprinkle Little salt also and fry them. Keep it aside.in the same kadai, add litle more oil, add bay leaf, chopped onens and saute till it become translucent.add the ground paste along with paste along with Turmeric Powder, Red Chilli Powder, SLIDER, SALDER, SATER Mix Well and Saute Till the Raw Smell of the Tomato Goes Away.Add the Chopped Ladies Finger and Paneer and Mix Well. Check for salt and cover it with a lid and cook bhindi and paneer masala for 2 minutes. Serve hot.Serv

recipe_ingredients: 250 Grams Button Mushrooms Cut Into Quarters, 1 Onion Finly Chopped, 3 Cloves Garlic, 2 Inch Ginger, 1 Teaspoon Turmic Power (Haldi) Oil For Cooking Salt To Taste To Pass To Pass, 3 Dry Red Chillies, 1 Teaspoon Coriander (Dhania) Seeds, 1 Teaspoon Cumin Seeds (Jeera), 1 Teaspoon Whole Black Peppercorns, 2 Cardamom (Elaichi) Pods/Seeds, 3 Cloves (Laungi)
recipe_description: To begin making the goan style mushroom vindaloo, first prep all the ingredients, and get all the spices together.the next step is to roast the masala for the vindaloo.heat a smallllet a Skillets; Add all the ingredients to be ground into a paste and roast them for a lesser you get a roasted aroma and the red chilies are lightly crisp.turn off the heat, allows it to cool a bit and Grind in trust The ginger and garlic in a pestle and motor and keep aside.heat oil in a pan; Add the ginger garlic paste and saute for a less seconds. Add the Chopped Onions and Saute Until the Onions are tender.add the turmeric power, the ground spice power, the mushrooms. Add the salt, cover the pan and simmer for 10 minutes until the mushrooms are cooked. Turn off the heat and serve warm.serv

recipe_ingredients: 4 Mango (Ripe) Small Variety, 5 Green Chillies Crushed (Adjust To Taste), 1/4 Cup Jaggery Salt To Taste Ingredients To Temperature, 1 Tablespoon Coconut Oil, 1 Teaspoon Mustard Seeds (Rai/ Kadugu), 1 Dry Red Chilli Broken, 1 Pinch Asafoetida (Hing) (A Generous Pin), 1 Sprig Curry Leaves
recipe_description: To begin making coorg style kaad manga curry recipe, first wash the ripe mangoes.using a knife to remove their tip and lightly make 2-3 vertical cuts on each mango to each man to help cook cook cute.Take , Until they are soft and cooked thoroughly on a Medium High Heat.When the color of the mango peel appears soft, you know they are cooked. It might take 10 minutes depending on the heat. Switch off Once Done Done and Drain Water Into A Bowl (Reserve for Later) and Keep the All Mangoes in the Pan and Allow the Mangoes to Cool Till Till handleable.you can also keep the saucepan in a plate Filled Child Water To Once the mangoes cool, peel them. You will be able to peel the mangoes easily using your fingers.put the mango peels into the bowl with the reserved water and extract any more remaining pulp by squeezing with. Discard peel once don and reserve the water as you do.Now Squeeze Cooked Mangoes with Hands to Make the curry Pulpy, Using A Masher is Dificult With Fibrous Pulp On The Seed of Mango.DO to the stone is Slurpy to Try, while Having the curry and you will love this experience for sure.keep saucepan back on a medium heat, Add crushed green chilli, salt and jaggery to the pAN with man .Adjust taste and Consistency of the Kaad Manga curry recipe by adding water if required. Let it simmer for a lesses and switch off heat.in a tadka pan, heat a little coconut oil and splutter mustard seeds. Once the Mustard seeds Splutter, Add Hing, Broken Red Chilli and Curry Leaves. Turn off the heat after the curry leaves crackle. Pour the tadka on kaad manga curry recipe and give it a quick stir. Close the Lid of the PAN and Allow the Kaad Manga Curry to Sit for About 10 Minutes Before Serving. recipe_ingredients: 1/4 Cup Masoor Dal (Whole) Washed And Drained, 1/4 Cup Green Peas (Matar), 1 Onion Finly Chopped, 1 Tomato Finly Chopped, 1/2 Inch Ginger Grated, 2 Cloves Garlic Green, 2 Green Challies Chillies Chillies Pieces, 1/2 Teaspoon Turmeric Powder (Haldi) Salt To Taste Ingredients For Seasoning, 1 Teaspoon Mustard Seeds (Rai/Kadugu), 1/4 Teaspoon Methi Seeds (Fenugreek Seeds), 1/2 Teaspoon Cumin Seeds (Jera), 1/2 Teaspoon Fennel Seeds (Saunf), 1/4 Teaspoon Kalonjie Masala Powder, 2 Teaspoon Mustard Oil Asafoetida (Hing) A Pinch

recipe_description: To make vatane ananasaa shaak recipe, we need to first wash and soak the white peas overnight. Next Morning wash them thoroughly and keep aside. In a pressure cooker add the drained white peas along with 1/2 cup of water, pressure cook for 3 whistles and then reduce the flame and cook for about 2-3 minutes. Turn off the flame. Drain the white peas and set aside.

Let it cook for a minute.add garlic and saute until it changes color. Add onion and saute until it turns translucent. Switch off and Add Mint leaves.saute and allows it to cool. Once Cooled, Transfer Everything to a Mixie Jar. Add coconut and coriander seeds to it. Add little water and grind into paste. Keep aside.heat oil in a heavy bottomed pan, add bay leaves and cumin seeds. Then add chopped onion and saute well.add ginger garlic paste and saute until the raw smell goes. Add tomato and saute until it turns mushy.Now add the ground masala along with required water for the gravy. Mix and Cook in a Medium Flame.Add Turmeric Powder, Chilli Powder, Coriander Powder, Garam Masala Powder and Required Salt.mix Bell and Cook Until the Oil Separates. Now add the eggs and mix well. recipe_description: To begin making the paneer gassi recipe, soak the ball of tamarind in hot water for 10 minutes.in a heavy bottomed pan add 1 teaspoon ghee. Roast Coriander Seeds, Cumin seeds, Fenugreek seeds, Driad Red Chillies, Pepper Corns One by One Until Fragrant. Be careful to roast on a low flame so as not to burn the spices. Once roasted remove from pan and set aside to cool.in the same pan, add sliced ​​onions, garlic and roast until onions start to turn brown. Now add freshly grated coconut and continue to roast until coconut starts to turn golden brown. Remove from pan and set it aside.squeeze out the water from the tamarind and throw away the seeds. Once all the roasted spices and the onion-coachut mix has cooled, add them all to a blender and blend into a smooth paste along with the tamarind water.Now add remains ghee/ coconut oil to the pana. Add cinnamon, cardamoms, cloves and saute until fragrant. Add sliced ​​onions and sauté for a minute. Add curry leaves, mix well.add the ground masala paste along with turmeric and cook until oil/ghee separates from the sides of the pan.afte a minute, add the ground masala paste along with Sides of the pan.add the paneer pieces and give it a good mix so that the paneer is coated uniformly with the masala. Continue Stirring for 5 Minutes. Now add thin coconut milk and salt to taste, brings it to boil.reduce flame to medium, cover and cook until well by. Once the chicken is cooked well, add thick coconut milk, Reduce to Simmer. Cook for a minute or two and turn off the flame. Do not let the curry come to boil as the milk Milk might curdle.serv

recipe_description: To begin making the satsaagi recipe we need to cook the vegetables. In a pressure cooker combine the peas, carrot, beans and lauki with some salt and 1/4 cup of water and pressure cook for one who. Turn off the flame and Immedited release the pressure. Transfer the Vegetables into a strainer and drain off the excess water. Set aside to cool. In the same pressure cooker yet add the washed washed wash Turn off the flame and allow the pressure to release naturally. Once the pressure has released, open the Lid, Drain off the Excess Water. Peel the Arbi and Set Aside. Heat a kadai with oil, to deep fry the rest of the vegetables. Firstly, deep fry the potatoes, until they turn into a light brown color. This will take about 3-5 minutes. Once cooked place the potatoes on an absorbent paper to drain off the excess oil. Next, deep fry the boil arbi, until they turn into a light brown color. This will take about 3-5 minutes. Once cooked place the arbi on an absorbent paper to drain off the excess oil.finally, Deep Fry the Capsicum Until Crunchy. This will take about 2-4 minutes. Once cooked place the capsicum on an absorbent paper to drain off the excess oil.getting ahead to brings the satsaagi togeether. Heat a skillet with ghee on medium flame, to this add the cumin seeds, asafoetida, ginger and green chilli and mix well. Now add the salt and turmeric power and allow it to cook for about 30 seconds. To this add, the potatoes, arbi, capsicum, and mix. At this stage add the boiled veggies, carrot, beans, peas, and lauki. Now sprinkle some red chilli powder, cumin power, amchur powder, garam masala, coriander powder and mix well until the vegetables are also coated with the masala. Finally Top This Satsaagi Sabzi with Tomato Pure, Mix and Cover and Cook for 2 Minutes.Open the Lid, Turn off the Flame, Add the Chopped Mint and Coriander Leaves and Coriander Leaves and Transfer the Satsagi into a serving. Serve Satsaagi Recipe along with Phulka, Sindhi Dal, Aam Ka Achaar, For a Comforting Complete Lunch Meal.

recipe_description: To begin making the mulakushyam recipe - a mixed vegetable lentil curry, first prepare the vegetables by peeling and cutting them. Wash the dal and keep aside.we will now cook everything a single pot, by eather using a pressure cooker or using a sauce pan method. If using the sauce pan method, follow the same instructions as below and cook until the Dal is soft and cooked through.place the washed Dal, the Chopped VEGETABLE, Slit Green Chillies Into CHILILES Into CE Add the turmeric, salt and about 2 cups of water. Place the weight on and pressure cook until you hear two whistles. After 2 Whistles, Turn the Heat to Low and Simmer for a Couple of Minutes and Turn off the Heat.allow the pressure to release naturally. Once the pressure has released, add the curry leaves, the coconut oil, salt and pepper to taste. Stir and give the mulakushyama brisk boil. Turn off the heat and transfer to a serving bowl.serv

recipe_description: To begin making Nutty Aloo Paratha Recipe, First Knead the Dough and Keep It ASIDE Few Drops of Ghee or Oil Can Be Added If required.

recipe_description: To begin making the mangalore cucumber chana dal sabzi, soak the channa dal in 2-1/2 cups of water for half an hour.while the chana dal is soking we will cook the Mangalore Cucumber in the presence. Place the cut mangalore cucumber in the pressure cook, with 1/4 cup of water, Sprinkle some salt and a pinch of turmeric power. Pressure Cook for 2 Whistles and Turn off the Heat. Once the pressure releases, transfer to a bowl and keep aside.next we will cook the Chana Dal in the Same Pressure Cooker. Place the Channa Dal Along with the Soaked Water and the Remining Ingredients. Cover the pressure cooker, place the weight on and pressure cook for a couple of whistles.after the two whistles, Turn the heat to low and simmer for 3 to 4 minutes and Turn off the heat. Allow the pressure to release naturally. You can see the video recipe of how to cook lentils in a pressure cooker.Once the pressure is released, open the cooker and stir in the caked mangalore cucumber. Check the salt and spices and adjust to suit your taste.The next step is to make the seasoning for the mangalore cucumber channel Channa Dal. Heat a small pan with a teaspoon of oil; Add the cumin seeds, a pinch of red chili power and red chilies. Roast for a Couple Seconds and Turn Off the seasoning into the mangalore cucumber Chana Dal, Stir in the Chopped Coriander Leaves and Serve Warm.Serve The Mangalore Cucumber Cucumber Chana Dal Sabzi Dal Sabzi Recipe Along A Complete Meal.

recipe_description: To begin making the chole capsicum masala recipe, soak cashew nuts in warm water for 12 to 15 minutes.heat oil in a wok/kadai. Fry for a minute, Taking care not to burn.Now add the tomato sauce/puree and boiled chickpeas along Paste of soaked cashew nuts.add the cashew paste to the curry along with salt. Simmer for 4 to 5 Minutes.Add Kasoori Methi, Remove from Flame and Serve Hot.Serv

recipe_ingredients: 1 Cup Green Beans (French Beans) Chopped, 1 Carrot (Gajjar) Chopped Into Small Cubes, 1/2 Green Peas (Matar) Chopped Into Small Cubes, 1 Potato (Aloo) Chopped Into Small Cubes, 1/2 Mangaloan Into Small Cubes, 1 Cup Pointed Gourd (Parval) Slit, 5 Green Chillies Slit, 3 Cups Coconut Milk For Tempening, 1/2 Teaspoon Mustard Seeds (Rai/Kadugu), 1-1
recipe_description: To begin making the karwar style Valval recipe (Mixed Vegetables in Coconut Milk), Boil all the Vegetables - Beans, Carrot, Peas, Potato, Mangalore Cucumber, Parval and Green Chillies in Water. They should be done but not mushy, so don't pressure cook.add the coconut milk, salt and cook for another 5 to 6 minutes. Take off the heat.The next step is to prepare the temperature. Heat Little Coconut Oil in a Heavy Bottomed Pan.Add Mustard and Cumin seeds. When they start popping, add the red chilies and curry leaves.pour the seasoning in the gravy and mix. Serve hot. Serve Karwar Style Valval Recipe (Mixed Vegetables in Coconut Milk) Along with Whole Whole Lachha Paratha and Beetroot Pachadi for a Weekday Meal.

recipe_ingredients: 500 Grams Elephant Yam (Suran/Senai/Ratalu) Cut Into Thin, 1/2 Inch Slices, 1/2 Teaspoon Mustard Seeds (Rai/Kadugu), 2 Teaspoon White Urad Dal (Split) ), 2 Sprig Curry Leaves Torn, 1/2 Teaspoon Turmic Powder (Haldi), 3 Tablespoons Coconut Oil For The Curry Powder, 1 Tablespoon Chana Dal
recipe_description: To begin making Senai Kizhangu poriyal recipe first make the curry power.into a preheated pan on medium heat add Chana Dal, Split White Urad Dal and Roast the Dals Till Golden Golden Brown and CRISP. Once done add coriander seeds, dry red chillies and roast for a minute. Finally add tamarind and saute for another few seconds and turn off the heat.allow the mixture to cool. Once all the ingredients are cooled add them to a small jar of the mixer grinder and blend to make a coarse power. Keep aside.heat coconut oil in wok or a pan; Once the oil is hot add mustard seeds and urad dal. Saute Till the Dal Turn Golden Brown.Once Done Add Broken Red Chillies, Asafoetida and The Curry Leaves. Stir for a more seconds and add in the yam.add the turmeric power, the ground masala and salt to taste. recipe_ingredients: 1 Mangalorean Cucumber Deseeded Cut Into Wedding With Skin, 2-1/2 Cups Tamarind Water, 1/2 Cup Arhar Dal (Split Toor Dal), 1 Teaspoon Turmeric Power (Haaldi) Salt To Taste Oi To Taste Oi Paste, 1 Tablespoon Coriander (Dhania) Seeds, 1 Teaspoon Cumin Seeds (Jeera), 1/2 Teaspoon Methi Seeds (Fenugreek Seeds), 1 Teaspoon White Urad Dal (Split), 1/2 Teaspoon Whole Black Peppercorns, 1 Cup Fresh Coconut  Grated, 3 Dry Red Chillies  (Byadagi, 2 Cloves Garlic Ingredients For Seasoning, 1 Teaspoon Oil, 1/2 Teaspoon Mustard Seeds (Rai/ Kadugu), 1 Teaspoon White Urad Dal (Split), 2 Dry Red Chillies, 2 Cloves Garlic, 1 Sprig Curry Leaves
recipe_description: To begin making the Thouthe Kodel Recipe (Mangalore Cucumber Curry); We will first cook the toor dal in the pressure cooker until soft and mushy. Place the toor dal in the pressure cooker along with 1-1/2 cups of water, turmeric power and salt.cover the pan, pressure cook until you hear one whistle. After the first whistle, turn the heat to low and simmer the Dal for about 3 to 4 minutes. After 3 to 4 minutes, turn off the heat. Allow the pressure to release naturally, as the Dal will continue to cook in the pressure cooker under pressure. Once done, whisk the Dal Until Smoth and Keep Aside.The Next Step is to Cook the Mangalore Cucumber (Touthe) Along with the Tamarind Water. Place the cut mangalore cucumber (touthe) and the tamarind water in the pressure cooker.add salt and cover the pressure cooker with its weight on. Allow it to pressure cook until you heat 2 to three whistles. After the Whistles, Turn off the Heat. Place the pressure cooker under cold running water to release the pressure immediatily. Cucumber cooks very fast, so its important to release the pressure immediatily, so it does not become not become mushy.The next step is to make the masala for the mangalore Cucumber Curry (TOTTHE) In small pan; dry roast the coriander seeds, cumin seeds, urad dal, fenugreek seeds, pepper corns and red chillies until you can smell the roasted aromas coming through.Place the roasted ingredients along with the coconut and garlic into a food processor and blend to make a smooth Paste.The final step is to combine all the ingredients. In a large sauce pan; Add in the cooked dal, the cucumber tamarind curry and the masala paste. Stir well to combine all the ingredients. Place the sauce pan on medium heat and give the Thouthe Kodel a Boil. Once it begins to boil, turn the heat to low and simmer until we get the seasoning ready.To prepare the seasoning for the third kodel; Heat oil in a small pan; Add all the seasoning ingredients. Allow the seeds to crackle and roast. Stir for a couple of seconds until you can smell the aromas coming through.add the seasoning to the simmering thouthe kodel and give it a stir. Transfer the Thouthe Kodel (Mangalore Cucumber Curry)

recipe_ingredients: 250 Grams Kaddu (Parangikai/ Pumpkin) Diced, 1 Teaspoon Mustard Seeds (Rai/ Kadugu), 2 Teaspoon White Urad Dal (Split), 2 Dry Red Chillies, 1 Sprig Curry Leaves, 1 Tablespoon Jaggery, 1 Talespoon Jaggery Jaggery, 1/4  To Taste Water As Needed
recipe_description: To begin making the pumpkin sweet curry recipe, we need to first prepare all the ingredients. In a heavy bottomed pan, add 2 teaspoons of oil. Once the oil is hot, add mustard seeds. When it crackles add urad dal, tear in the red chillies and curry leaves. Saute It Till Urad Dal Turns Golden Brown.Next Add the Diced Pumpkin/Haddu, salt and enough water to coat the bottom of the pan. This will ensure that the bottom does not burn and the pumpkin gets cooked. Cover the pan with a lid and cook for 5 to 10 minutes in a medium flame. Keep stirring in between so that you can check for donation and check the level of water. Once the poosanikai/haddu is cooked, add 1 tablespoon of jaggery. Stir all the ingredients well until the Jagger Melts. Finally add grated coconut and mix it well. Turn off the heat and pumpkin sweet curry is ready to be served. Serve Pumpkin Sweet Curry Recipe along with Steamed Rice and Mixed Vegetable Sambar Recipe for a Complete South Indian Meal.

recipe_description: To begin making the karwar nkgsb style bharli vangi recipe - brinjal curry, first washles thoroughly with water.cut off the stem and make two semi slits in it from the top to getting a + This is for stuffing the masala. Immerase in Sualism Water Till Use. Cut the potatoes into thick wedding or large chunks and immerse in sufficient water.next, heat a small kadhai and add the oil. recipe_description: To begin making the sweet corn poriyal recipe, first pressure cook Take them out of the cooker and keep them aside. recipe_description: To start preparaing arbi dahi wali sabzi, scrub arbi to get rid of mud and dirt. Wash it twice at least. Pressure Cook Arbi with Little Water and a Pinch of Salt for 1 Whistle (Do Not Overcook). Arbi has to be cooked, but firm.peel the skin off and cut them into half, lengthWise.Whisk yogurt or dahi well, keep aside.heat oil in a pan. Add ajwain and sauté for 10 seconds.add red chili powder, turmeric powder, coriander power and give it a mix.add arbi and cook in oil and Spices for about 10 to 12 Minutes on Meedi with Constant Water and brings it to boil. recipe_ingredients: 10 Small Brinjal (Baingan/Eggplant), 2 Tablespoons Tamarind Paste Thick, 1/4 Cup Water Salt To Taste, 4 Tablespoons Oil, 1 Teaspoon White Urad Dal (Split), 1 Sprig Curry Leaves For The Mentha, 2 Tablespoons Coriander (Dhania) Seeds, 1 Tablespoon Chana Dal Dry Red Chillies Adjustable, 2 Tablespoons Raw Peanuts (Moongphali) Optional
recipe_description: To begin making the mennthi vankaya recipe, in a pan, dry roast ingredients mentioned under methi karam/Spice powder which include incoriander seeds, chana dal, urad dal, sesame seeds, SEEDESTEDESS, FEEDESS This will take about 2 minutes. Otherwise, the powder becomes oily. Keep the powder aside to stuff in the brinjals.next, wash and pat dry the small brinjals thoroughly. Slit brinjals in such a way that you see an x ​​at the base. Be careful not to slit open them completely.in a bowl, add water with salt and immerse the brinjals in salt water for 5 minutes.in a heavy bottomed pan, add half of the water, required salt and guired salt Boil. Make sure there is only one layer of brinjals. Do not put one brinjal over the other.cook covered until brinjals are 80% don. This will not take more than 6 to 10 minutes. Now, add tamarind paste. If there is not enough water left, add some more water. Mix and Cook for Another 2 or 3 Minutes Until Brinjals Absorb All the Salt and Tamarind Flavors. Remove from Pan, Cool Them Completely. Drain the remaiing water.in the meaning, take a regular sending thread, measure the length equal to twice the diameter of brinjals and cut into 10 or 12 pieces. After the brinjals are cooled down, Stuff them with Spice Powder and Wrap the Thread Around them Gently. This ensures the spice powder does not come out while frying. Heat oil in the same wide pan, fry urad dal until golden and add curry leaves. Fry until crisp and gently place stuffed and secured brinjals in the pan. Fry the brinjals until they are completely cooked. Sprinkle the remaiing spice power on the top.turn the brinjals gently using a fork and a spoon. Do not use a ladle as it may break the brinjals.Once the brinjals are soft and cooked properly, remove the thread carefully and serving careve hot.serv your family

recipe_ingredients: 2 Cups Whole Wheat Flour Salt To Taste, 1 Teaspoon Oil For Filling, 1 Teaspoon Oil, 1 Onion Finely Chopped, 1 Red Bell Pepper (Capsicum) Finely Chopped, 1 Green Bell Pepper (Capsicum) Finely Chopped, 1 Carrot (Gajjar) Grated, 5 Cloves, 5 Cloves Garlic Finley Choppeder  Finely Chopped, 2 Cups Paneer (Homemade Cottage Cheese) Grated, 1/2 Teaspoon Garam Masala Powder, 1 Teaspoon Fennel Seeds (Saunf) Crushed, 1 Teasoon Red Shlaspoon Red Shilli Powder Powder Pudeles (Pudeli Pudeli Powders) For Slurry, 1/4 Cup Whole Wheat Flour, 2 Tablespoons Water
recipe_description: To begin making the veg mughlai paratha recipe, get all the ingredients ready and prepaped up.for dout, in a large mixing bowl, add the flour, salt and mix cell to combine. Add a little water at a time to make a smooth dough. Once the dough has come togetra, drizzle a little oil and knead again to make the dough smooth.to make the MUGHLAII Stuffing, Heat Oil in a preheated pan over medium heat. Add the onion, ginger, garlic, and bell peps.saute until the onion and bell pepper have softtened.add the grated carrot, Green Chilli, Paneer, Garam Masala, CRUSHED FENNEL SEEDES, SALLI SEEDERS, SALLI SALT and MINT Stir Well to Combine and Turn off the Heat.check the Salt and Seasonings and Adjust According to Taste. In a small mixing bowl, combine the wheat flour and water and make a smooth paste without lumps. This is called the slurry mixture. Divide the dough into 4 large portions. Heat the skillet on medium heat; Place the roti on it and cook it for a more seconds each side till you see light bubbles and not allows complete to cook completely. Processed the similar way with the remaining roti's.remove the partally cooked roti and place it on a clean surface.spoon a large purtion of the filing mixture in the center. Spread the Slurry mixture Around the edges of the roti. Carefully fold the roti in such a way to make a square. Seal the edges with more slurry if required.place the stuffed roti on the preheated PAN. Cook on Both Sides, Using Little Oil or Ghee Till the Parathas are Golden Brown. Make sure you cook on medium heat so the parathas get cooked honestly from inside out.once don, serve hot. recipe_description: To begin making the kashmiri pulao recipe, first wash and soak the rice for about 45 minutes. After 45 minutes, drain the water and keep aside.in a heavy bottom sauce pan, heat 2 tablespoons of ghee.add bay leaf, shahjeera, black cardamom, cloves, Green Cardamom, Cinnamon Stickes and Cinnamon stickes Roasted Aroma.Add a Tablespoon of Broken Cashews and Fry for Another Minute Until Until Until The Cashews are Roasted Golden.add Ginger Julienne, Ginger Powder, Ginger Powder, Fennel Powder, Fennel Powder, Kashmiri Chili Powder, Kashmiri Chili Powder, Salt and The Sows Add milk, saffron milk, water and brings the Pulao to a Brisk Boil. recipe_ingredients: 1 Cup Red Matta Rice, 3-1/2 Cups Water Salt (If Required)
recipe_description: To begin making the matta rice first wash the rice in a saucepan three times and soak the rice in water for half an hour.drain the soaked rice and transfer it to a press. Add 3 cups of water in the pan of the pressure cooker, cover and place the weight on.cook the matta rice in the pressure cooker on Medium High Heat for 3 to 4 Whistles; After the 3 to 4 Whistles Turn the Heat to Low. Pressure cook the rice for another 5 to 8 minutes and turn off the heat.allow the pressure to release naturally. Wait for the pressure to release completely and then open the cooker.the matta rice takes a little longer to cook than the traditional rice and hence the cooking time is much longer. Serve Matta Rice With Mixed Vegetable Sambar, Cabbage Thoran/Poriyal and Spicy Lime Pickle for a Vegetarian option or you can serve it with kerala style fish curry for a non vegetariyan option.

recipe_description: To begin making the labra recipe, clean, wash and cut vegetables as mentioned and collect them in a large bowl. Add water in the bowl and keep aside.heat oil in a large wok and add panch phoran masala, bay leaf and green chillies and wait Till they splutter. recipe_description: To begin making the tok dal recipe, peel and SLICE THE MANGOES, Along with the Seed If Possible. Let it crackle.add the cooked dal and 1/2 cup water to the temporing.add salt to taste and boil till the dal thickens.once it is done, switch off the stove an it is ready to be served.tangy, creamy and Light, Tok Dal Goes Best With Steamed Rice and A Dollop of Ghee.

Done, allow the pressure to release naturally, grind it along with its juice to a smooth paste.heat a kadai with oil, add cardamom pod, bay leaf and allow it to sizzle.ad in grunddddddddle sizzle. The raw smell goes away.add in all the spice powders mentioned Above Including Cumin Powder, Coriander Powder, Turmeric Powder, Turmeric Powder, Read Chilli Powder and Stir Well, Cover Ette With FORTHERES 5 , Salt to taste, you can add 1 cup of water and cook till the masala comes together.at the end sprinkle little kasuri methi and give it a stir.serve the fish tikka masala gravy recipe along with naan, pickle The side to complete your meal ,

recipe_ingredients: 1 Cup Yellow Moong Dal (Split) Mooli Ke Patte (Radish Greens) A Bunch Finly Chopped Salt To Taste, 3 Clooves Garlic Finly Chopped, 1 Inch Ginger Grated, 1 Teaspoon Turmeric Powder (Haldoon) (Halderic Powon) Amchur (Dry Mango Powder), 2 Tablespoons Oil Ingredients For Tempening, 1 Tablespoon Ghee, 1 Teaspoon Cumin Seeds (Jera), 2 Dry Red Chillies
recipe_description: To prepare the moong dal with radish greens recipe, begin by cleaning and washing the moong dal. Soak it in water for 10-15 minutes.meanwhile wash the radish greens well and chop them finly.next, in a pressure cooker heat a teaspoon of cooking oil over medium heat. Once oil is hot enough add the chopped garlic and grated ginger. Stir fry on low heat till garlic turns light brown in color.add the soaked moong dal along with turmeric power, read chili power, mango powder and 2 cups of water and stir to comb to comb to comb to comb to comeback. Close the Lid of the Pressure Cooker and Let the Moong Dal Cook over Medium Heat for 2 to 3 Whistles. Turn off the heat. Allow the pressure to release naturally.While the Dal is cooking in the pressure cooker, in a pan heat a teaspoon of oil over media. Add the chopped radish greens and cook until the greens are wilted and cooked through. Turn off the heat and keep aside.Once the pressure has released, Open the Lid of the Pressure Cooker and Gently Mash the Dal With the back the spoon. This will help thicken the moong dal. Add the cooked radish greens and stir to combine. Check the salt and spice levels and adjust to suit your taste.The last step is to temperature the dal. In a tadka pan, heat some ghee on medium heat. When it is warm, add the cumin seeds. Once he crackle, add the red chilli, roast the chillies for a less seconds and turn off the heat.pour the tadka over the dal and stir to combine. Serve Moong Dal With Radish Greens Hot Along with Phulkas, Rice and Salad.
